questions.question: Describe the key differences between the Chalk and Talk method and the PowerPoint Presentation method in terms of teacher engagement and student participation. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the pros and cons of each method

questions.question: How can a teacher ensure that their PowerPoint presentation is engaging and effective in facilitating the learning process, particularly in a classroom setting with limited technical resources? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the role of active learning strategies

questions.question: What are the potential drawbacks of relying solely on the Chalk and Talk method for teaching and learning, and how can these be mitigated in a modern educational setting? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the impact of technology on the teaching and learning process
